summary: ACORD binding panel fully enhanced to display Wave 8 mapping engine candidates with semantic context and category mode.

extraction_details_section.feature: New section showing Wave 8 semantic metadata
display_fields: Semantic Label - Extracted semantic field label
Field Type - Inferred field type (text, date, numeric, checkbox, signature, radio)

acord_candidates_list.feature: Full ranked list of ACORD candidates from Wave 8

per_candidate_display.acord_code: Code of candidate with check mark if chosen
per_candidate_display.label: Full ACORD label text
per_candidate_display.source: Source signal: dictionary, heuristic, embeddings, geometry, category, or fusion
per_candidate_display.confidence_score: Visual confidence indicator with color coding

acord_candidates_list.interaction: Click candidate to select and apply to field metadata

metadata_flow.field_updated: Field metadata with chosen ACORD label and code
metadata_flow.ui_refresh: Properties panel and binding panel update

contains: Each suggestion has: acordCode, label, confidenceScore, source, description
Each mapping has: chosen candidate, rationale

candidate_source_attribution.dictionary: Direct ACORD code lookup by text similarity
candidate_source_attribution.heuristic: Field cue matching (name, address, zip, etc.)
candidate_source_attribution.embeddings: Semantic text similarity to ACORD labels
candidate_source_attribution.category: ACORD category priors and window search
candidate_source_attribution.fusion: Combined signal fusion with learned weights
candidate_source_attribution.color_coding: Each source displays with standard Wave 8 styling

no_field_selected.display: Help text: Select a field to inspect ACORD bindings

mapping_empty.display: Candidates list shows available ACORD codes

validation.panel_renders: PASS - Binding panel fully renders Wave 8 metadata
validation.candidates_display: PASS - All candidates shown with sources
validation.click_handlers: PASS - Candidate selection updates field metadata
validation.styling_consistency: PASS - Follows design system colors and spacing
